sheets._comment: Bajaj TW Comp & SAOD.xlsx — Agency 2W Comprehensive grid (1802). State × monthly GWP volume bands (0-50K / 50K-1L / 1-2L / 2-3L / 3L+) + Max Scooter band. Note 2: Bajaj/Vespa/Jawa/RE rollover -5%. Note 9: IRDA = OEM 22.5% / non-OEM 17.5% on OD. Cells like '5% on OD & 0% on TP' split into two rules.
sheets.name: Agency 2W Grid - 1802

sheets._comment: Bajaj TW Comp & SAOD.xlsx — RTO-code-level overrides for the 1802 grid. Same 5 volume bands + Max Scooter, but keyed by RTO code (sub_type) instead of state. Region = Commission Grid State (col 2). Comp + SAOD emitted per cell, plus Bajaj/Vespa/Jawa/RE rollover -5%.
sheets.name: RTO Based Payouts File

sheets._comment: Bajaj TW Comp & SAOD.xlsx — RTO code → state-name mapping.
sheets.name: RTO State Mapping

These flat_table entries used to emit malformed duplicate rules (region/sub_type inverted, no segment/make) and have been removed.
